title: The sonorants: ง น ม ย
pedagogy: Low-class consonants (3/5): unpaired sonorants ง น ม ย — nasals and glides with no high-class partner; they double as the finals that make syllables live.

exercises.title: Sonorants — the unpaired lows
exercises.thaiExample: ง น ม ย
body: The rest of the low class are sonorants: humming, flowing sounds — ng, n, m, y, r, l, w.
They have no high-class partner; no other consonant duplicates their sound.
Remember them as a group: a syllable that ENDS in a sonorant counts as live, which will decide its tone.
